source_text: For very large systems, it might be useful to restrict the space that is scanned to select important configurations. The flag above specifies the energy threshold (in eV) for config- urations to be considered. Obviously, it must always be larger than < <Ethr>. By default, all excitations are considered, but this may be adjusted to e.g., <PTmax> = 3 · <Ethr> in case it is necessary.

protected_source_text: For very large systems, it might be useful to restrict the space that is scanned to select important configurations. The flag above specifies the energy threshold (in eV) for config- urations to be considered. Obviously, it must always be larger than [[FORMULA_1]] <Ethr>. By default, all excitations are considered, but this may be adjusted to e.g., <PTmax> = 3 · <Ethr> in case it is necessary.
protected_translated_text: 对于非常大的系统，限制扫描空间以选择重要配置可能是有用的。上述标志指定了配置被考虑的能量阈值（以eV为单位）。显然，它必须始终大于[[FORMULA_1]] <Ethr>。默认情况下，所有激发态都会被考虑，但必要时可调整，例如设置为<PTmax> = 3 · <Ethr>。
translated_text: 对于非常大的系统，限制扫描空间以选择重要配置可能是有用的。上述标志指定了配置被考虑的能量阈值（以eV为单位）。显然，它必须始终大于< <Ethr>。默认情况下，所有激发态都会被考虑，但必要时可调整，例如设置为<PTmax> = 3 · <Ethr>。

source_text: This provides user-defined parameters for \alpha and \beta which are used in the calculation of \gamma _ { A B } ^ { K } and \gamma _ { A B } ^ { J } , respectively. By default, they are calculated from the amount of Fock exchange and the standard parameters for global hybrid functionals[1]. It is wise to change these parameters for range-separated hybrid functionals with sTD methods. Pa- rameters for five widely available range-separated hybrid functionals can be found in Ref. 30 (see also Sec. 3.3.2) for sTD methods.

, respectively. By default, they are calculated from the amount of Fock

protected_source_text: This provides user-defined parameters for [[FORMULA_1]] and [[FORMULA_2]] which are used in the calculation of [[FORMULA_3]] and [[FORMULA_4]] , respectively. By default, they are calculated from the amount of Fock exchange and the standard parameters for global hybrid functionals[1]. It is wise to change these parameters for range-separated hybrid functionals with sTD methods. Pa- rameters for five widely available range-separated hybrid functionals can be found in Ref. 30 (see also Sec. 3.3.2) for sTD methods.
protected_translated_text: 这为用户定义的参数[[FORMULA_1]]和[[FORMULA_2]]提供了设置，它们分别用于计算[[FORMULA_3]]和[[FORMULA_4]]。默认情况下，这些参数根据Fock交换量和全局杂化泛函的标准参数计算得出[1]。对于使用sTD方法的范围分离杂化泛函，明智的做法是调整这些参数。五种广泛可用的范围分离杂化泛函的参数可在参考文献30中找到（另见第3.3.2节），适用于sTD方法。
translated_text: 这为用户定义的参数\alpha和\beta提供了设置，它们分别用于计算\gamma _ { A B } ^ { K }和\gamma _ { A B } ^ { J }。默认情况下，这些参数根据Fock交换量和全局杂化泛函的标准参数计算得出[1]。对于使用sTD方法的范围分离杂化泛函，明智的做法是调整这些参数。五种广泛可用的范围分离杂化泛函的参数可在参考文献30中找到（另见第3.3.2节），适用于sTD方法。

source_text: Calculate singlet-triplet excitations (using a spin-restricted ground state).

source_text: This invokes the (X)sTD-DFT procedure instead of the default (X)sTDA[2].

source_text: Depending on the method ((X)sTDA or (X)sTD-DFT), this creates the files ciss a, cist a, sing a or trip a and prints out the lowest eigenvectors up to <#vec> (i.e., -vectm 5 will print out the five lowest eigenvectors). If no number is specified, all eigen- vectors that were determined are printed, but one should keep in mind that this can lead to very huge files!

protected_source_text: Depending on the method ((X)sTDA or (X)sTD-DFT), this creates the files ciss a, cist a, sing a or trip a and prints out the lowest eigenvectors up to <#vec> (i.e., -vectm 5 will print out the five lowest eigenvectors). If no number is specified, all eigen- vectors that were determined are printed, but one should keep in mind that this can lead to very huge files!
protected_translated_text: 根据所用方法（(X)sTDA 或 (X)sTD-DFT），这会生成文件 ciss a、cist a、sing a 或 trip a，并打印出最低的 <#vec> 个特征向量（例如，-vectm 5 将打印出五个最低的特征向量）。如果未指定数字，则会打印所有已确定的特征向量，但需注意这可能导致文件非常庞大！
translated_text: 根据所用方法（(X)sTDA 或 (X)sTD-DFT），这会生成文件 ciss a、cist a、sing a 或 trip a，并打印出最低的 <#vec> 个特征向量（例如，-vectm 5 将打印出五个最低的特征向量）。如果未指定数字，则会打印所有已确定的特征向量，但需注意这可能导致文件非常庞大！

source_text: Invoke sTDA-xTB or sTD-DFT-xTB calculation schemes (see Sec. 7). In this case, the xtb4stda binary wavefunction file (wfn.xtb) is read instead of a Molden input file. The respective parameters \alpha , \beta , and a _ { x } are set automatically.

spans.content: Invoke sTDA-xTB or sTD-DFT-xTB calculation schemes (see Sec. 7). In this case,
the xtb4stda binary wavefunction file (wfn.xtb) is read instead of a Molden input file.

protected_source_text: Invoke sTDA-xTB or sTD-DFT-xTB calculation schemes (see Sec. 7). In this case, the xtb4stda binary wavefunction file (wfn.xtb) is read instead of a Molden input file. The respective parameters [[FORMULA_1]] , [[FORMULA_2]] , and [[FORMULA_3]] are set automatically.
protected_translated_text: 调用 sTDA-xTB 或 sTD-DFT-xTB 计算方案（参见第 7 节）。在这种情况下，读取 xtb4stda 二进制波函数文件（wfn.xtb）而非 Molden 输入文件。相应的参数 [[FORMULA_1]]、[[FORMULA_2]] 和 [[FORMULA_3]] 会自动设置。
translated_text: 调用 sTDA-xTB 或 sTD-DFT-xTB 计算方案（参见第 7 节）。在这种情况下，读取 xtb4stda 二进制波函数文件（wfn.xtb）而非 Molden 输入文件。相应的参数 \alpha、\beta 和 a _ { x } 会自动设置。
